hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, re
try:
    input_data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
file_path = input_data.get('file_path', '') or input_data.get('path', '')
if not file_path.endswith(('.tf', '.tfvars')):
    sys.exit(0)
content = input_data.get('new_string', '') or input_data.get('content', '')
pattern = re.compile(r'(password|secret|token|api_key|private_key)\\s*=\\s*\"[^$\\{][^\"]{3,}\"', re.IGNORECASE)
if pattern.search(content):
    print('BLOCKED: plaintext secret detected in IaC file. Use var.* references or data.aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
sys.exit(0)
"
